Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Release Court-Deposited Funds To E K Y Builder Inc. And Stella Tan
Off Calendar Sep-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT EKY BUILDER, INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO RELEASE COURT-DEPOSITED FUNDS TO EKY BUILDER INC. AND STELLA TAN

Appearances: James Braden (415.595.4385) for respondent and moving party; No other appearances.

Argued and the court modifies its ruling as follows: Granted. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Samuel K. Feng, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/SKF)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order To Release Court-Deposited Funds To E K Y Builder Inc. And Stella Tan
Off Calendar Aug-07-2025 Continued To Sep-15-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: RESPONDENT EKY BUILDER INC.'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO RELEASE COURT-DEPOSITED FUNDS

Appearances: James M. Braden (415.595.4385) for respondent and moving party; No other appearances.

Mr. Braden requests a continuance, which the court grants. The matter is continued to September 15, 2025, at 9:30 am. Mr. Braden to give notice of the continuance to all parties that are entitled to notice. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

MOTION / Notice Of Hearing & Notice Of Claim And Claim For Surplus Funds; Points & Authorities; Declaration
Off Calendar Jun-03-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

RESPONDENT EKY BUILDER, INC.'s MOTION AND CLAIM FOR SURPLUS FUNDS is DENIED. Application is not supported by admissible evidence.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

HEARING RE" SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS
Off Calendar Aug-25-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

HEARING RE" SURPLUS FUNDS FROM PROCEEDS: Claim filed on May 17, 2023 by EKY Builder, INC is denied. The claim is not supported by any evidence and does not state the amount claimed.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Petition To Superior Court To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar Jun-15-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jordan Rabago; Aldridge Pite LLP; 858-750-7600; appearing as counsel for Petitioner Clerar Recon Corp.
Jonathan Tung; John N. Kitta & Associates; 510-708-4231; appearing as counsel for Claimant Eky Builder, Inc.

Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER CLEAR RECON CORP'S PETITION TO SUPERIOR COURT TO DEPOSIT SURPLUS FUNDS is GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Prevailing party to prepare order. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Petition To Superior Court To Deposit Surplus Funds
Off Calendar May-18-2023 Continued To Jun-15-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER CLEAR RECON CORP Notice Of Petition To Superior Court To Deposit Surplus Funds is CONTINUED to June 15, 2023. Petitioner to provide the Court with supplemental briefing to clarify: (1) which two claimants are in dispute; (2) what the dispute is; and (3) the status of the remaining claimants, including whether their claims have been resolved. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
